FortDelMarSetting.DelMarAerialPitchActivation_Description:
A button must be pressed in addition to the vehicle pitch up/down buttons in order to pitch the vehicle in the air when not using a controller (see Aerial Pitch Activation in the Keyboard Controls tab). 
When this setting is turned off, the vehicle will pitch in the air immediately upon pressing Pitch Vehicle Up or Pitch Vehicle Down.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarInvertSteerMethod_Description_Swit:
Determines how steering changes when the vehicle goes upside down.

Default - Steering direction does not change until Left Stick is returned to neutral, moved in the opposite direction, or another Button is pressed.
Immediate - Steering direction changes as soon as the vehicle inverts.
Delayed - Steering direction changes 0.5s after the vehicle inverts.
Never - Steering direction never inverts.

Determines how steering changes when the vehicle goes upside down.

Never - Steering direction never inverts.

FortDelMarSetting.DelMarScreenShakeIntensity_Description: Determines intensity of Screen Shake effects.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarTouchControlsLayout_Description:
Determines what touch controls layout is used.

D-Pad - Uses four directional buttons to control the vehicle's steer and pitch.
Joystick - Virtual joystick to hold and drag in each direction to control the vehicle's steer and pitch.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarVerticalKickflipInverted_Descripti: Inverts vertical air dodge direction. Turning this setting on will make air dodge go downward when pitching up and vice versa.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarPitchDeadzone_Description: Minimum amount of aerial pitch that will be registered for the vehicle when using an axis binding.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarCameraDeadzone_Description: Minimum amount of camera swivel that will be registered for the camera when using an axis binding.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarSteerDeadzone_Description: Minimum amount of steer that will be registered for the vehicle when using an axis binding.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarThrottleDeadzone_Description: Minimum amount of throttle that will be registered for the vehicle when using an axis binding.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarToggleThrottle_Description:
Throttle forward turns on/off with the press of a button and stays on/off until the button is pressed again rather than requiring the button to be held down. 
Throttle forward will turn off if throttle backwards is pressed while on the ground.

FortDelMarSetting.DelMarAerialBrakeThrottleKBM_Description: Using Throttle Backward in the air will act like Throttle Forward when not using a controller.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarAerialBrakeThrottleGamepad_Mobile_: Using Throttle Backward in the air will act like Throttle Forward when using a controller or touch controls.
FortDelMarSetting.DelMarAerialBrakeThrottleGamepad_Descrip: Using Throttle Backward in the air will act like Throttle Forward when using a controller.
